summary: This is a brief promotional post where Joel Spolsky congratulates Bob Walsh on publishing his book 'Web Startup Success Guide,' for which Joel wrote the foreword. He also highlights an interview with David Allen (GTD Guru) that appears as chapter 8 of the book and is available to read online. The post is essentially a book recommendation and signal boost for a colleague's work.
key_points: Joel wrote the foreword for Bob Walsh's 'Web Startup Success Guide'
The book includes an interview with GTD expert David Allen as chapter 8
Joel uses his platform to promote work by people in his professional network
money_quotes: Congratulations to Bob Walsh on publishing his Web Startup Success Guide (to which I wrote the foreword).
key_insight: A short endorsement post promoting Bob Walsh's book on web startups, notable mainly for Joel's involvement as foreword author.
